items.title: Hawthorne Apartments — Energy Simulation
items.description: 8,760-hour annual EnergyPlus simulations of a pre-1980 ~100-unit residential building, powered by a Revit→Rhino.Inside→Honeybee pipeline running on iLab's supercomputer.

items.title: Climate Validity Framework for LEED v4
items.description: An academic framework re-evaluating LEED v4 credits against climate-zone validity. Submitted to Building and Environment.

items.title: ADA Accessibility Checklist — Mobile Tool
items.description: Standalone HTML survey tool for on-site ADA audits. Works offline, exports structured reports.

items.title: BIM-based Accessibility Compliance
items.description: Hybrid rule engine pairing a Python numeric evaluator with an LLM for qualitative ADA clauses — driven by IFC parsing via ifcopenshell.
